title: collomia grandiflora f. tenuiflora
intro: Collomia grandiflora f. tenuiflora, also known as the slender collomia, is a flowering plant in the phlox family that is native to western North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Collomia grandiflora f. tenuiflora include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
